calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Plaintiff was late, matter was put over to the 02:00 pm. calendar.
Petitioner, Albert Tran present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Toby Luu.
Decree signed in open court.
